name: Lovecraft Letter
description: Lovecraft Letter is Seiji Kanai's cosmic-horror reskin of his beloved Love Letter — same elegant 16-card deduction skeleton, with Cthulhu Mythos cards layered on top, an Insanity mechanic that lets you wield forbidden powers at the cost of your character's grip on reality, and an investigator-versus-cultist endgame. Compact, devious, and cursed in all the right ways.
